document.title: Usability Validation Report for ADD(HAD1717MCW / HAD1417MCW) Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Usability validation report for ADD HAD1717MCW and HAD1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents participant usability testing, task completion results, satisfaction measures, improvement needs, and usability conclusion for the ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
keyPoints: The ADD detector is indicated for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting adults and children.
The device is not to be used for mammography.
Seven participants were involved in onsite usability testing.
Task completion success rate was 100% and passed for ACT #1 through ACT #9.
Residual risk regarding usability is stated as minimized and acceptable.

entities.name: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: The ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

entities.name: Lee, Dongho
entities.evidence: Prepared R&D Manager Lee, Dongho Nov 7 2023

entities.name: Hur Namkyu
entities.evidence: Approval Quality Manager Hur Namkyu Nov 7 2023

concepts.name: Intended use
concepts.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Intended Use
concepts.evidence: This product is intended to obtain the information necessary for the diagnosis of the patient through the anatomical structure of human body obtained by a film or an image processing (workstation) process of examination using radiation exposure with cassette IP, CR or DR (Portable flat panel).

concepts.name: Indications for use
concepts.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Indications for Use
concepts.evidence: The ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

concepts.name: Mammography exclusion
concepts.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Mammography Exclusion
concepts.evidence: Not to be used for mammography.

concepts.name: Usability test objective
concepts.evidence: A usability test is intended to determine the extent an interface facilitates a user’s ability to complete routine tasks.

concepts.name: Task completion success rate
concepts.pageTarget: ADD Usability Task Completion Success Rate
concepts.evidence: Task Completion Success Rate Criteria: A total completion rate of 100 % in each usability task. Result: 100 % (Pass)

concepts.name: Residual usability risk
concepts.evidence: Usability verification & evaluation results and improvement action demonstrated that residual risk regarding usability is minimized and acceptable.

evidence.claim: ACT #1 through ACT #9 all passed with a 100% task completion result.
evidence.evidenceText: Task Completion ACT #1 ACT #2 ACT #3 ACT #4 ACT #5 ACT #6 ACT #7 ACT #8 ACT #9 Pass Pass Pass Pass Pass Pass Pass Pass Pass 100 % Pass

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; metadata only provides authoritySignal as general.
Acceptance criteria wording repeatedly states 'over 100%' operators, which appears unusual but is transcribed as source text.
